title: Fix regex escaping bug in URL pattern matcher
description: The URL pattern matcher was using an unescaped dot in the regex, causing 'api.v1' to also match 'apixv1'. Added proper escaping with backslash-dot.
diff:
diff --git a/routing/patterns.py b/routing/patterns.py
index 6e7f8a9..b0c1d2e 100644
--- a/routing/patterns.py
+++ b/routing/patterns.py
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ import re
 
 # URL path patterns for API versioning
 API_PATTERNS: dict[str, re.Pattern] = {
-    "v1": re.compile(r"^/api.v1/"),
+    "v1": re.compile(r"^/api\.v1/"),
     "v2": re.compile(r"^/api\.v2/"),
 }
comments: wendy: Good catch on the unescaped dot. Approve.
author: xavier
